elements.original_description: A shopping cart overflowing with random items like clothes, electronics, and snacks, all haphazardly thrown in.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a shopping cart overflowing with random items like clothes, electronics, and snacks, all haphazardly thrown in, under vibrant store lighting, with a sense of clutter and impulse, high resolution, sharp focus, filled composition.

elements.original_description: A close-up of a person's face smiling brightly while holding a shopping bag, with a warm glow around them.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a close-up of a person's face smiling brightly while holding a shopping bag, with a warm glow around them, cinematic lighting, emotional and joyful mood, soft bokeh background, high resolution.

elements.original_description: A minimalist illustration of a person sitting surrounded by unused purchases, looking confused and overwhelmed.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a person sitting surrounded by unused purchases, looking confused and overwhelmed, pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, simple and clear design.
